reviews.review_msg: Great guy, interesting class. Really helps with critical thinking when it comes to marketing and the underlying issues. Its a discussion based class, so be ready to participate to earn some points. Cool real life marketing plan at the end, get the chance to make a difference. Debate is fun too, make sure to stay true to your side of the argument!
participation participation participation! His sounds like an easy maker, but lot of people got a C. This class is not useful.

nice and young prof. to get an A make sure u read ur textbook and go to lecture or read hes notes its not hard to get an A. u dont have to memeorize all the stuff! its pretty simple just as long as u read it. the TA was a bit hard on marking but overal fair and gives lots of help. all mc for exams!=) definitely recommend to take it with him!!
